title: Project Template System for Workspace
description: Add a workspace feature that provides predefined project templates (e.g., web development, data analysis, DevOps) with pre-configured skills, context files, and toolsets. Users can select a template when starting a new project, reducing setup time and ensuring best practices.

title: Dynamic Personality Blending
description: Enable users to blend multiple personalities (e.g., Astra and a custom sister) in real-time to create hybrid agent behaviors. This would involve a weighted combination of personality traits, response styles, and knowledge domains, adjustable via slash commands or settings.

title: Predictive Tool Caching and Pre-fetching
description: Enhance the backend tool invocation system by caching results of frequent tool calls and implementing a prediction mechanism to pre-fetch likely-needed tools based on conversation context and history, reducing latency and improving agent responsiveness.
